description: To generate and visualize temporal changes by combining multiple assessment or prediction layers for the same Area of Interest (AOI).
The tool consists of two sections:
Displays all previously created time series.
Each generated time series is automatically saved in this section.
Select any saved time series to view it.

subdescription: On the right-hand side, you will see the analysis and statistics of the timeseries data.
Whole AOI: If you have selected this option, you will see the statistics for the entire dataset.
Map Extent: If you have selected this option, you will see the statistics only for the current map extent. As you zoom in or out, the extent will change accordingly.
This toolbar provides play controls to play, pause, or move forward/backward through the timeseries data.
You can also adjust the playback speed of the timeseries here.
The dates for all datasets in the timeseries are displayed on the timebar.

description: Choose the required Data Type (Prediction or Assessment).

subdescription: Select Prediction as the Data Type.
Choose the required prediction layers generated for the same AOI across different time periods.
Use the search bar to find the required layers.
Select a minimum of two prediction layers to create a time series.
Click Create Series to generate the prediction time series.
Select Assessment as the Data Type.
Choose the required Index Type (for example, NDVI).
Select the assessment layers for the same AOI across different time periods.
Use the search bar to find the required layers.
Select a minimum of two assessment layers to create a time series.
Click Create Series to generate the assessment time series.
